status: FROZEN before the prospective split was generated. One development cycle, one prospective run.

admissible_intervention_repertoire.for_STRUCTURE (ancestry, lags, independe: one-step pulses on cells, every phase of the inferred period
admissible_intervention_repertoire.for_FUNCTION (the reachable manifold): SUSTAINED source regimes only: free running, plus constant clamps on every subset of the module's sources. Transient pulses are NOT used to populate the manifold. A one-step glitch is not an operating regime, and letting a single transient sample define a row of a law is how an artefact becomes a physics. This is a DECLARED restriction: a pulse WOULD reach some rows that clamps cannot, so every coverage figure below is coverage RELATIVE TO THIS REPERTOIRE, and that is exactly what the INDETERMINATE verdict is reporting.
admissible_intervention_repertoire.never: clamping a boundary TAP. A tap is a consequence; clamping it fabricates a world.

held_out_implementations.tri_tap: one source through THREE taps at three lags + a register: 4 taps, 2 causes
held_out_implementations.sync3: duplicated clock tap + TWO registers with byte-identical baseline series: 4 taps, 3 causes
held_out_implementations.edge_xor: identical current input, different history, different output (a rising-edge detector)
held_out_implementations.reg_delay: the SAME macro function built out of INTERNAL STATE and a different delay: contains a register and yet is NOT a state machine at its interface

burned.xnor_and/and_or prospective worlds (D-06: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY, never used as evidence here
burned.development family: used for qualification; may not appear in any prospective split

failure_rule: One development cycle, one frozen prospective run. If it fails: preserve, retire, do not patch; classify the failure as source discovery / manifold identification / transducer inference / scope calibration; keep EXP-SC-01 BLOCKED; move to an active experiment-planning observer.
